arts.ttl: Monaco v Aston Villa: Champions League – live
Aston Villa team news confirmed as Unai Emery makes surprise decision vs Monaco
arts.sum: Villa XI vs Monaco: Martinez, Cash, Konsa, Mings, Digne, Kamara, Tielemans, Bailey, Buendia, Rogers, Watkins. In come Lucas Digne, Leon Bailey and Emi Buendia, who makes his first start in the Champions League.

arts.ttl: Monaco vs. Aston Villa team news: How many changes has Unai Emery made for crucial Champions League game?
arts.sum: Monaco and Aston Villa name their starting lineups for Tuesday's Champions League fixture.

arts.ttl: Watkins starts over Duran for Aston Villa vs Monaco LIVE!
arts.sum: Unai Emery wants Aston Villa to target at least four more points to guarantee their progress into the next round of the Champions League. Four more points would mathematically ensure Villa's progress, but Emery believes there is a chance as little as one draw could be enough to see them through.

arts.ttl: Jack Grealish leaves door open for Aston Villa return as European giants swoop in
arts.sum: Grealish signed for Manchester City from Aston Villa for a then-British record transfer fee of £100 million in 2021. Jack Grealish has left the door open for a potential return to Aston Villa as two European giants make a move.

arts.ttl: Monchi moves to ‘portfolio of alternatives’ – Aston Villa won’t be wobbled by Sevilla for Loïc Badé
arts.sum: A little earlier, we covered claims from Turkey which explained Monchi has stopped Diego Carlos moving to Fenerbahce until he can find a replacement for Aston Villa. The Brazilian defender has had his flight departure delayed multiple times and it’s unsure when, or if, he’ll actually set off for Istanbul this week. arts.ttl: Teenage forward set to reject Aston Villa despite 'concrete' contract offer
arts.sum: They say Leipzig, AC Milan and Villa submitted ‘concrete’ long-term contracts to one of the most sought-after youngsters in Ligue 2. Gomis almost moved to Bayer Leverkusen in the summer of 2023, agreeing personal terms only for Caen to knock back all offers.

arts.ttl: Aston Villa could still sell Jhon Duran despite €100m price tag
arts.sum: Aston Villa could still sell Jhon Duran despite €100m price tag On Monday, West Ham launched a sensational €67 million bid for the Colombian striker that was swiftly rejected by Aston Villa, who have repeatedly insisted that Duran is not for sale this month.

arts.ttl: Àlex Moreno ‘would be delighted’ to swap Nottingham Forest for new loan – Aston Villa player has options
arts.sum: Àlex Moreno moved from Real Betis to Aston Villa in January 2023, but two years later he finds himself on loan at Nottingham Forest. Last season the 31-year-old picked up a decent number of minutes for Aston Villa, dropping out of the picture a little at the end of the campaign.
